scenes.scene_summary:
- Sets a calming, focused atmosphere with continuous aquarium visuals.
- Hooks the user with a simple 10-minute daily practice commitment.
- Uses scrolling text to explain Supernova's core value proposition: AI tutor practice and real-world speaking scenarios instead of just reading.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट practice करके अपनी English सुधारें [Improve your English by practicing 10 minutes a day]
3
2
1
शुरू करें! [Let's start!]
English बोलना सीखना बहुत आसान है — और Supernova के साथ, यह और भी मज़ेदार हो जाता है। [Learning to speak English is very easy — and with Supernova, it becomes even more fun.] Studies show that practicing speaking for just 10-15 minutes a day builds confidence faster. Why does it work? Because Supernova gives you real-world situations — interview, office, या दोस्तों के साथ बातचीत [or conversations with friends]. You get an AI Tutor to practice speaking without any hesitation. Just 10-15 minutes a day is enough to see real progress. धीरे-धीरे, Supernova आपको English में सोचना और बोलना सिखाता है। [Slowly, Supernova teaches you to think and speak in English.]
